description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named emscripten that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with archlinux:base-devel, installs dependencies, sets up emscripten 3.1.67, checks out the code, builds a profiler GUI with cmake and ninja, compresses artifacts with zstd and gzip, and uploads the artifacts. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, waits for the build job, and deploys the artifacts to a remote server using SFTP with credentials from secrets.
